rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type annexes for port assumptions/guarantees, and implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees should reference component ports only in valid scopes.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only declared variables or visible AADL features.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Component type contracts should use assumptions for input bounds and guarantees for output behavior.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not assume numeric types for event ports or opaque data.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
